req.title: Immunization record (boundary)
req.statement: A clinician shall record an Immunization with administered date not in the future. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

doc.reasoning: The requirement mandates that an Immunization record's administered date must not be in the future. This drives four key partitions: (1) a clearly valid past date (EP positive), (2) today's date as the exact boundary (BVA boundary), (3) tomorrow's date as the first invalid value past the boundary (BVA negative), and (4) a future date well beyond today to confirm consistent rejection (NEG negative). Each test is self-contained via fixtures providing clinician auth headers and a base URL, uses deterministic date computation relative to test-run date, and is idempotent because each POST either creates a resource that can be recreated or is rejected without side effects.

tests.name: test_immunization_past_date_accepted
preconditions: Caller holds role:clinician with valid bearer token
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
actions: Compute a date 30 days before today
POST /Immunization with occurrenceDateTime set to that past date
expected: Response body occurrenceDateTime matches submitted date
trace: R-HLT-035: valid partition — administered date in the past is accepted
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def test_immunization_past_date_accepted(clinician_headers, base_url):
    past_date = (date.today() - timedelta(days=30)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "COVID-19"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/P-001"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": past_date
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["resourceType"] == "Immunization"
    assert body["occurrenceDateTime"] == past_date

tests.name: test_immunization_today_date_accepted
preconditions: Caller holds role:clinician with valid bearer token
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
actions: Compute today's date (exact boundary: last valid value)
POST /Immunization with occurrenceDateTime set to today
expected: Response body occurrenceDateTime matches today's date
trace: R-HLT-035: boundary — today is the last permitted administered date
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date
import requests

def test_immunization_today_date_accepted(clinician_headers, base_url):
    today = date.today().isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Influenza"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/P-001"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": today
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["resourceType"] == "Immunization"
    assert body["occurrenceDateTime"] == today

tests.name: test_immunization_tomorrow_date_rejected
preconditions: Caller holds role:clinician with valid bearer token
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
actions: Compute tomorrow's date (first invalid value past the boundary)
POST /Immunization with occurrenceDateTime set to tomorrow
expected: Response body indicates date validation error
trace: R-HLT-035: boundary off-by-one — tomorrow is the first disallowed administered date
R-HLT-035: error pathway — 422 when date > today
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def test_immunization_tomorrow_date_rejected(clinician_headers, base_url):
    tomorrow = (date.today() + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Influenza"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/P-001"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": tomorrow
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "issue" in body or "error" in body

tests.name: test_immunization_far_future_date_rejected
preconditions: Caller holds role:clinician with valid bearer token
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
actions: Construct a date 365 days in the future
POST /Immunization with occurrenceDateTime set to that far-future date
expected: Response body indicates date validation error
trace: R-HLT-035: negative path — far-future date is clearly outside valid partition
R-HLT-035: error pathway — 422 when date > today
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def test_immunization_far_future_date_rejected(clinician_headers, base_url):
    far_future = (date.today() + timedelta(days=365)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Hepatitis B"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/P-001"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": far_future
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "issue" in body or "error" in body

tests.name: test_immunization_missing_date_rejected
preconditions: Caller holds role:clinician with valid bearer token
fhir-lite service is reachable at BASE_URL
expected: Response body indicates occurrenceDateTime is required
trace: R-HLT-035: decision table — row where administered date is absent; required field constraint must be enforced
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_immunization_missing_date_rejected(clinician_headers, base_url):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "MMR"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/P-001"}
        # occurrenceDateTime intentionally omitted
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base_url}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=clinician_headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "issue" in body or "error" in body
